name: Sesame Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the chicken thighs in half across the bone.
2. Marinate them in the soy sauce, sherry, ginger and enough cornstarch to make a thick sauce for 1 hour.
- Add the sesame seeds.
3. Deep fry pieces in peanut oil at 375°F until lightly browned.
- You can try substituting beef for the chicken.
